since_last: 36% of 101 AI names green; AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure leads +0.47%; AI bubble risk 50 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 36% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.89% · BTC -1.00% · Gold +1.25% · Nasdaq100 +1.93%. 36% of 101 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure is doing the heavy lifting at +0.47%.

cards.headline: AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure leads, AI Chips & Compute lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure at +0.47%; weakest is AI Chips & Compute at -2.18%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: SMCI is the standout at +16.67%
cards.body: Leaders: SMCI +16.67%, NXE +4.56%, DELL +4.31%, OKLO +3.26%, HPE +2.91%. Laggards: SKHY -5.70%, CEVA -4.22%, TER -3.75%, AMBA -3.20%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +0.78% at $124.5
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +0.78% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 50 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 50/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
